title: haumaniastrum triramosum
intro: Haumaniastrum triramosum, also known as the "Three-ringed Haumaniastrum," is a type of plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Chinese and Tibetan cultures, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Haumaniastrum triramosum include relieving headaches, fever, and joint pain, as well as reducing swelling and promoting digestion. Haumaniastrum triramosum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and capsules, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
